title: v0.4.0 - MCP Protocol
description: Extensible tools: MCP client/server, dynamic tool discovery, config scopes, /mcp command

title: Research Ollama Cloud glm-4.7 token limits
description: Find context window size for glm-4.7:cloud on ollama.com

title: Implement intelligent context compaction with evals
description: Improve /compact to shrink context based on conversation intent. Create evals using larger model to measure compaction quality. Document and run experiments.
close_reason: Compaction strategies with evals implemented, 13 tests passing

title: Auto-compaction at 95% token limit
description: Automatically compact context when approaching token limit (configurable, default 80%). Show status message. SAGE_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD env var.

title: Support Claude Code integration: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, 64k+ context
Ollama API spec: 200/201/400/404/429 codes, Retry-After for rate limits
description: Document Ollama API error handling. Cloud has hourly/weekly limits. Local has no limits. See docs.ollama.com/api

title: Configure token limits for local/cloud providers
description: Set reasonable defaults for host.lan (local Ollama) vs cloud API providers to avoid hitting context limits

title: Add versioning and build step
description: Add versioning support and proper build workflow for guile-sage. Consider WASM target (low priority via guile-hoot).
close_reason: Implemented version module and build targets

title: Streaming responses
description: Support Ollama streaming API with newline-delimited JSON. Display tokens as they arrive.

title: Added make patch/minor/major and GitHub release targets
description: Semantic versioning with bump-version.sh, make tag, make release using gh CLI

title: Added Docker container and GHCR workflow
description: Alpine-based minimal container, multi-stage build, GitHub Actions workflow for container.yml

title: v0.5.0 - Agent Modes
description: Specialized modes: plan mode, ask mode, background agents, headless CI/CD, pre-commit hooks

title: Retry logic with exponential backoff
description: Handle 429, 503, network errors with configurable retry. Respect Retry-After header.

title: v0.2.0 - Robustness & Streaming
description: API reliability: retry logic (429/503), streaming responses, auto-compaction at 95%, improved error messages

title: QA: Create test harness and red team security tests
description: Comprehensive test harness with adversarial security testing for sandbox escapes, path traversal, injection attacks, and permission bypasses.

title: v0.3.0 - Context & Memory
description: Smarter context: conversation search, project memory, web fetch, @-mentions, codebase mapping
